changes: Import useColorTheme hook (new hook to be created)
Import lucide-react icons: Monitor, Sun, Moon, Check
Add new Card component between 'Dados da Empresa' and 'Regras trabalhistas' cards
Card structure: CardHeader + CardTitle + CardDescription + CardContent with two sections
Section 1 (Modo): Three clickable tiles with icons (Monitor/Sun/Moon) using useTheme()
Section 2 (Paleta): Four color preview cards using useColorTheme()
Add CSS variables for 3 color theme palettes: blue, green, violet
Each palette has light `:root` and dark `.dark` blocks
Zinc theme is default (no data-attribute needed, uses existing :root/.dark)

files_to_create.purpose: Custom hook for managing color theme persistence and DOM updates
functionality: useEffect on mount: read localStorage key 'escalaflow-color-theme', apply data-color-theme attribute
setColorTheme(theme): update state, persist to localStorage, apply/remove DOM attribute
For 'zinc': remove data-color-theme attribute (uses defaults from :root/.dark)
For others: setAttribute('data-color-theme', theme) on document.documentElement

existing_patterns: EmpresaConfig.tsx uses CardHeader + CardTitle + CardDescription + CardContent structure (see lines 124-133, 237-246)
Cards are wrapped in div with 'gap-6' and 'overflow-y-auto' (line 121)
useApiData hook pattern: useState + useEffect + fetcher callback (see useApiData.ts lines 3-28)
useTheme from next-themes: destructure { theme, setTheme } and use it directly (AppSidebar.tsx line 77)
Icons from lucide-react imported at top level (AppSidebar.tsx lines 11-18)
Tailwind utility classes: 'border-primary', 'bg-accent', 'bg-muted/30', 'ring' are used for selection states

Label components: plain text wrapped in

or

tags with 'text-sm' classes (EmpresaConfig.tsx lines 180-182)
Check icon from lucide-react used for selected state (AppSidebar.tsx line 227)
cn() utility function used to conditionally apply classes (AppSidebar.tsx line 219)
dependencies_installed: next-themes: already configured in main.tsx (line 12) with ThemeProvider
lucide-react: already installed, icons available (Sun, Moon, Monitor, Check verified in codebase)
shadcn/ui components: Card, CardHeader, CardTitle, CardDescription, CardContent, Separator verified available
react-hook-form: not needed for this feature (useColorTheme uses useState/useEffect only)
tailwind: already configured with CSS variables in hsl() format
css_variables_structure: Light theme (:root) and dark theme (.dark) blocks
findings.approach: Create useColorTheme hook to manage localStorage + DOM attribute updates. Modify EmpresaConfig.tsx to add Aparencia card with two sections: mode selector (reusing next-themes hook) and color palette selector (using new hook). Add CSS variable overrides in index.css for 3 themes (blue, green, violet) with light/dark variants. No tailwind.config.js or main.tsx changes needed.
risks: Color preview circles in palette cards need exact HSL values - must hardcode preview colors or map from CSS (recommend hardcoding for performance)
localStorage key collision: 'escalaflow-color-theme' must not conflict with other keys (verify no duplicates in codebase)
Flash of wrong theme on page load: useEffect runs after render, could cause flash (mitigation: apply theme early in mount or use inline script in index.html - PRD notes this consideration)
data-color-theme selector specificity: must ensure .dark[data-color-theme] selector has higher specificity than :root values
Zinc theme edge case: must ensure removing attribute reverts to :root/:dark defaults correctly
Responsive layout for palette cards: 4-column layout needs mobile responsiveness (2x2 grid suggested)
notes: temaOpcoes in AppSidebar.tsx shows pattern: array of objects with value, label, icon (lines 59-63)
EmpresaConfig uses CardContent className='space-y-6' for section spacing
Form/Input components available for future extension but not needed for this feature
App.tsx uses HashRouter - no server-side concerns for localStorage
Color theme must apply to document.documentElement not document.body (affects inheritance)
